content_body:
What a great time we had at this beautiful home! Great time. We cruised downtown Blue Ridge, ate at the Cabin Grille, and Happy Dayz for lunch. Tramped around here, grilled out, had wine and great banana bread and GA caviar and chips and steaks. Hot tub at 2 in the morning was grand. Unfortunately, the train tickets were sold out, so we missed the train ride. Maybe next year. Thanks for a great time in your home - we will be back.
FL & GA
title: Great Food in the North Georgia Mountains!
